message:
Increase PR check timeout in release script

Increase the maximum wait time for PR checks from 5 minutes to 10 minutes
to allow more time for CI checks to complete before timing out.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -307,7 +307,7 @@ main() {
             
             # Check if there are required checks
             print_info "Checking PR status..."
-            local max_wait=300  # 5 minutes max
+            local max_wait=600  # 10 minutes max
             local waited=0
             local pr_state
